attributes.description: Alerts when `sqlserver.memory.grants.pending.count > 0`. Queries unable to get memory grants cannot execute.
attributes.name: [SQL Server OTel] Memory grants pending

investigation_guide.blob:
## SQL Server memory grants pending

### What fired
Memory grants pending > 0 during the window.

### Why it matters
Queries request memory for sorts / hashes before executing. Pending grants mean the workspace memory is exhausted — queries wait and may time out.

### Triage
1. Check memory configuration.
2. Look at queries with large memory grants (sorts, hashes).

### Remediation
- Add memory or tune queries.

### Tuning
- Fires on any non-zero value.

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-default
// Queries waiting for memory grants cannot execute; any sustained non-zero is critical
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.memory.grants.pending.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS max_pending = MAX(metrics.sqlserver.memory.grants.pending.count),
       instance_id = MAX(resource.attributes.service.instance.id)
  BY COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, host.name, "unknown")
| WHERE max_pending > 0
| KEEP instance_id, max_pending
